name: Watt Utilities mention in first 20s
description: Lead-gen intro must explicitly identify Watt Utilities within the first 20 seconds (Watt gates Step 5, Lead Gen CRITICAL #1).

name: Supplier impersonation
description: Agent must not claim to be calling FROM a supplier (e.g. 'British Gas', 'E.ON'). Watt is a broker and any impersonation is a CRITICAL fail (Step 5 Lead Gen CRITICAL #2).

name: Guaranteed savings claim
description: Agent must not promise guaranteed savings, lowest price, or that the customer 'can't get better' (Step 5 Lead Gen CRITICAL #3).

name: Whole-market claim
description: Agent must not claim Watt searches the whole market or every supplier (Step 5 Lead Gen CRITICAL #4).

name: Pressure after objection
description: Agent must de-escalate or end the call after a clear customer objection — continued pressure is a CRITICAL fail (Step 5 Lead Gen CRITICAL #5).

name: Decision-maker confirmation
description: Agent must confirm the customer is the bill-payer or authorised decision maker (Step 5 Lead Gen HIGH #1).

name: Contract / renewal status check
description: Agent must ask when the current supply contract ends before pitching (Step 5 Lead Gen HIGH #2).

name: Clear process explanation
description: Agent must clearly explain the broker-quote-switch process — flagged via clarity heuristic (Step 5 Lead Gen HIGH #3).

name: Approved script followed
description: Verbal contract must follow Watt's approved supplier-specific script (Step 5 Verbal CRITICAL #1).

name: Commission disclosed
description: Verbal contract must disclose Watt's commission / fee from the supplier (Step 5 Verbal CRITICAL #2).

name: Contract terms stated
description: Verbal contract must state supplier, term length, unit rate, and standing charge (Step 5 Verbal CRITICAL #3).

name: Clear customer agreement
description: Customer must give an explicit verbal agreement (yes / agree / confirm) — silence or ambiguity fails (Step 5 Verbal CRITICAL #4).

name: Agent does not answer for customer
description: Agent must give the customer space to respond — answering on the customer's behalf is a CRITICAL fail (Step 5 Verbal CRITICAL #5).

name: Script not rushed
description: Speech-rate threshold + customer-interruption count flag a rushed script (Step 5 Verbal HIGH #1).

name: Summary read-back
description: Agent must read back a summary of agreed terms before closing (Step 5 Verbal HIGH #2).

name: No customer confusion
description: Repeated 'what?' / 'I don't understand' / asks-for-repeat by the customer signal confusion (Step 5 Verbal HIGH #3).

name: MPAN / MPRN captured
description: Supply number(s) must be captured before submitting a quote — coaching gate.

name: Expected go-live date stated
description: Agent should state the expected supply start date so the customer can plan — coaching gate.

name: Annual cost stated
description: Agent should give an estimated annual cost so the customer can compare — coaching gate.

name: Polite greeting
description: Intro should open with a polite greeting — coaching gate.

name: Closing courtesy
description: Close stage should end with a courtesy thank-you — coaching gate.
